lanes.name: Design
lanes.subtitle: Access, discovery, schema and campaign design

lanes.name: Development and Build
lanes.subtitle: Amazon Connect and CI Data Lake via IaC

lanes.name: Configure
lanes.subtitle: Ingestion, profiles, campaigns, flows and agent workspace

lanes.name: Deploy and Test
lanes.subtitle: UAT access, outbound campaigns, monitoring and fixes

lanes.name: Evaluation
lanes.subtitle: Final design, hypercare, feedback review and sign-off

lanes.name: Design
lanes.subtitle: Reporting requirements, dashboard layout, metrics and access

lanes.name: Development and Build
lanes.subtitle: QuickSight data sources and campaign, compliance, agent dashboards

lanes.name: Review and Iterate
lanes.subtitle: Dashboard walkthrough, feedback iteration and handover docs

lanes.name: Roadmap
lanes.subtitle: Additional use cases, wider deployment scope and business case

workstreams.name: Workstream 1 - Outbound Voice Campaigns in Amazon Connect

tasks: Prerequisites (access)
Conduct discovery workshop with program manager for RDC
Identify information needed from flat file ingestion
Identify data to be uploaded back to CRM
Agree data schema
Design Outbound Campaign structure for Voice
Socialise with stakeholders and get feedback and approval
Build Amazon Connect instance via CloudInteract IaC modules
Build CI Data Lake via IaC
deliverables: Fully built-out Amazon Connect instance, including CI Data Lake, in customer's dev environment

tasks: Configure data ingestion pipeline
Configure Customer Profiles including data mapping
Build outbound campaigns for Voice
Build out contact flows in Amazon Connect
Set up agent workspace and disposition codes
deliverables: Fully built-out Voice outbound campaigns solution, in customer's dev environment

tasks: Identify UAT users
Provide UAT users with access to environment
Enable outbound campaigns
CI engineering resource on hand for monitoring and bug resolution
Document feedback throughout test period
Document final design
Finish Hypercare
Facilitate feedback review, and acceptance criteria evaluation
deliverables: Outbound Voice campaigns live in Amazon Connect

workstreams.name: Workstream 2 - Custom Reporting, Analytics Dashboards and Roadmap

tasks: Review Pilot success criteria and KPI definitions with Centrica stakeholders
Agree dashboard layout and metrics with RDC operations and compliance teams
Define data sources, refresh schedules and access permissions for QuickSight
Configure Amazon QuickSight data sources from Amazon Connect Contact Lens and campaign data, held in CI Data Lake
Build campaign performance dashboard: contacts/hour, RPC rate, connection success rate, abandonment rate vs Ofcom threshold, conversion rate, revenue/collections
Build compliance dashboard: FCA/Ofgem script adherence, CLI presentation accuracy, GDPR consent tracking, audit log access
Build agent experience dashboard: idle time, call handling time, outcome capture accuracy
Configure role-based access for Centrica stakeholders
deliverables: QuickSight dashboards deployed to dev environment
All agreed KPIs tracked and available in dashboard

tasks: Walk through dashboards with Centrica stakeholders and capture feedback
Iterate on dashboard design based on feedback
Provide handover documentation and end-user guidance
Review additional Use Cases across the business areas
Validate the scope and business potential for wider deployment
Draft a roadmap with associated business case
deliverables: Futures roadmap of the validated solution
